title: Open modal above modal

posts.author: hadas (Hadas)
posts.cookedHtml:
I try to open a modal above modal, using SDK.
I run monday.execute('openAppFeatureModal') and from inside this modal I run monday.execute('openFilesDialog').
the opening of second modal cause the parent modal to be reloaded after close FileModal.

any idea?

posts.author: dipro (Dipro Bhowmik)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey @hadas – I noticed you sent us a ticket about this as well. Let’s follow-up there and circle back to this thread when we find a solution, so we can share it with the rest of our community.
